microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled the team to scale program delivery without proportional headcount growth.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable standard for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating stakeholders across engineering, finance, and senior leadership.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill-planning workflows, reducing **planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating how AI can scale program throughput without sacrificing quality or consistency.

Developed cross-functional playbooks and coordination frameworks adopted across 6+ partner orgs, bringing consistency and clarity to a previously fragmented resilience program and enabling faster onboarding of new teams into the execution model.

Operated with high agency on ambiguous, high-profile initiatives — scoping new program workstreams end-to-end, aligning stakeholders across engineering and operations, and driving execution from zero structure to repeatable, scalable infrastructure.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to prioritizing intent-based YAML generation as a high-impact capability in the next planning cycle.

Drove program health improvements by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and establishing a more scalable, data-backed knowledge infrastructure for the team.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, generating $3M in accelerated revenue and compressing region launch timelines by 28% through structured stakeholder coordination and clear decision criteria.

Built the strategic foundation for a toil-reduction roadmap by conducting discovery interviews with 20+ service teams, **quantifying 81 hours** of manual effort per region launch and mapping the highest-leverage automation opportunities to a phased execution plan.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the data infrastructure to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and measure program health over time with analytical precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and sequencing execution to protect live operations throughout the transition.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep a complex, multi-team program on schedule through periods of ambiguity.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a more consistent, scalable release infrastructure for the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end proposal and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly engagements, introducing a CRM-based process that brought consistency, reduced dropped leads, and improved conversion at every stage of the funnel.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy that optimized the company website, Google Business profile, and targeting parameters across paid and organic channels.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating findings into actionable model updates — demonstrating the analytical instincts this role demands.

tailoring_notes: 'Platformized system' and 'self-service scheduling' (microsoft_ft bullets 1–2) mirror JD language around 'build systems that don't yet exist' and 'scalable infrastructure.'

'Cross-functional playbooks and coordination frameworks' (microsoft_ft bullet 6) is pulled verbatim from the JD's 'Cross-functional playbooks and infrastructure' workstream, directly signaling fit for that deliverable.

'Recruiter enablement' framing (microsoft_2023 bullet 1) maps to the JD's 'Recruiting team onboarding and enablement' workstream, repositioning the adoption work as directly analogous to enabling a recruiting team.

'Program health' and 'analytical precision' language (microsoft_2022 bullet 3, pro_painters bullet 3) mirrors the JD's 'use data to evaluate program health, spot patterns, and make informed decisions' skills requirement.
'High agency' and 'end-to-end ownership' framing (microsoft_ft bullet 7) directly echoes the JD's 'high agency — you move fast, take ownership end-to-end' as a named skill requirement.
